case_title: BIPIN KAPADIA VS. ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $65. SERVED MAR-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, HANSABEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF BIPPIN KAPADIA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS NEHA BHAGAT. DEFENDANT ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HITESH PATEL (EMPLOYEE). DEFENDANT BHAVESH PATEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANSABEN PATEL IS NOT PRESENT BUT REPRESENTED BY HITESH PATEL (SON). DEFENDANT HITESH PATEL IS PRESENT. CASE HEARD TOGETHER WITH CSM-23-866695 KAPADIA VS SHRINIKA INVESTMENTS, LLC ET AL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS RETAINED; ONE SET OF EXHIBITS FOR BOTH CASES. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2023 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HITESH PATEL (HANSABEN'S SON) FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL, HANSABEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,825.87 FILED BY KAPADIA, BIPIN AS TO DEFENDANT ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC PATEL, BHAVESH PATEL, HANSABEN PATEL, HITESH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY KAPADIA, BIPIN ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC PATEL, BHAVESH PATEL, HANSABEN PATEL, HITESH

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HITESH PATEL, EMPLOYEE. FILED BY DEFENDANT ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $55. SERVED MAR-22-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, HITESH
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING - 05-22-23 AT 1:30PM]; (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL, BHAVESH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-29-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAPADIA, BIPIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC $6,009.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,139.00, ARMAAN INVESTMENT, LLC OWES PLAINTIFF $6,009.00 IN UNPAID INSURANCE PREMIUMS PLUS COURT COSTS. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO PIERCE THE LLC AND HOLD THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS LIABLE FOR THE LLC'S OBLIGATION TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
